packageRules.description: Helidon 4 is a breaking rewrite (SynchronousProvider, io.helidon.metrics.RegistryFactory, MP-metrics Meter/Tag are all gone). The code targets Helidon 2.x, so a major bump does not compile until it is migrated by hand. Keep Renovate from proposing/merging Helidon majors; minor+patch within the current major still flow. Remove this rule only together with the Helidon 4 code migration.
